reviews.text: This place is delicious! I typically stop in when it is cold for the atole of the day they do during the cold months. The Elote atole is 100% my favorite. The drinks aren't the end though, because the food is delicious! Be sure to get some Mole' when they have it and try their unique to the area Vera Cruz style Mexican food! The staff is always friendly and they are even updating the building to accommodate eating in. Give La Fonda a try and you will not be disappointed!

reviews.text:
I decided to try a New Mexican Restaurant today and the previous reviews made this an easy decision. The outside is the restaurant is clean and has a sign that easily identifies the restaurant.
As I entered the restaurant, I was quickly greeted and my order was promptly taken. It was about 10 minutes total to get my food.
I ordered the Asada burrito dinner and was very impressed with the taste of the steak. The burrito had little to no grizzle on the steak which is a big plus in my book. It was just over $11 for a burrito, rice, and beans. With the prices the way they are, this is a good price. The burrito was filled with meat and was a perfect lunch choice. I also have to commend the effort they put into packing the to go container so the food isn‚Äôt a jumble mess in there. They also supplied napkins, hot sauce, silverware, etc without being asked.
The inside of the restaurant was clean. I only wished they had some tables to enjoy my food inside instead of in my car.
reviews.raw:
Wally Kochan
Local Guide ¬∑ 28 reviews ¬∑ 111 photos

reviews.text: Walked in with my two boys just before closing and they were happy to see and serve us. Taco Tuesday is 3 for $6 bucks, which is an unbeatable deal today, and came out fresh and delicious. Best part might be the freshly made churros, however, as they are serious in size and came out perfect. We waited maybe 10 min for our order, totally fine, and were told each of us could get a drink on the house. Looking forward to giving them more of my business in the future.

Been here twice now.  I really like it.  This is my go to spot now.
UPDATE:
I have probably been here a dozen times or more.   Still delicious as always.   It amazes me how many other Mexican restaurants are near me and their food is trash.  The only other place that is good is much more expensive.
Thank you for not cheaping out on ingredients and not charging a fortune.
